Class SequentFormulasGenerator<Goal extends ProofGoal<@NonNull Goal>>

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.strategy.costbased.termgenerator.SequentFormulasGenerator<Goal>
All Implemented Interfaces:
TermGenerator<Goal>
public abstract class SequentFormulasGenerator<Goal extends ProofGoal<@NonNull Goal>> extends Object implements TermGenerator<Goal>
Term generator that enumerates the formulas of the current sequent/antecedent/succedent.
